biography: Tommy, representing Espoo Ringside Golf, has become a familiar figure at the Hector Trophée, known for his earnest dedication to the competition. His participation, though not yet culminating in a victory, speaks volumes of his commitment to the spirit of the event.

Across his three appearances in this esteemed tournament, Tommy has consistently displayed a focused approach to the challenges presented by both the individual and pair formats. While the ultimate prize, the Hector Trophée, and the individual Victor Trophy have remained elusive, his drive to excel has been unwavering.

Though fans will note his absence from the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, Tommy remains an active part of the Hector events community. His past contributions have undeniably added to the competitive atmosphere, and his continued pursuit of a breakthrough victory is a narrative many will follow with keen interest in future iterations.
